summary: Initial comprehensive testing of Shalom Learning MVP completed. Backend APIs working excellently (87.5% success rate), frontend user experience is smooth with working authentication, course catalog, language switching, and PIX checkout flow. Mobile responsive design confirmed.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of 401 for unauthorized requests
minor_bugs.impact: Cosmetic - HTTP status code difference, functionality works correctly

ui_bugs.issue: FAQ items found but accordion interaction may not be fully functional

passed_tests: API health check and all CRUD operations
User signup and login with JWT authentication
Course catalog with 10 courses (6 tech + 4 language)
PIX payment creation with receipt upload
My Courses page showing purchased courses
Language switcher for all 5 languages (PT, EN, FR, ES, HT)
Complete purchase journey (course browse → buy → checkout)
